tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"FortiGate7.0.14-1","command":"config firewall policy
 move 4 before 100
 move 3 before 100
 move 2 before 100
end
show firewall policy"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
config firewall policy

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) #  move 4 before 100

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) #  move 3 before 100

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) #  move 2 before 100

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) # end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # show firewall policy
config firewall policy
    edit 4
        set name "Deny_Ubuntu_Exfil_To_Internet"
        set uuid 64da8476-294a-51f1-4084-6e5333a849d9
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set logtraffic all
    next
    edit 3
        set name "Allow_Ubuntu_Web_to_Internet"
        set uuid 64c652d0-294a-51f1-9065-a4af9b515ff7
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "HTTP" "HTTPS"
        set logtraffic all
        set nat enable
next
    edit 2
        set name "Allow_Ubuntu_to_LAN_ICMP"
        set uuid 64b69c6e-294a-51f1-ccce-5835adc4cf94
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port2"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "PING"
        set logtraffic all
    next
    edit 100
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-NAT"
        set uuid f9d90c40-2937-51f1-d69d-ea2eba750bce
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set nat enable
next
end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM #
